scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n vite,electron -c green,cyan --kill-others "npm run dev -w packages/frontend" "npm run dev -w packages/desktop"
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w packages/frontend && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run dist -w packages/desktop
